vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #739

plan.title: feat(skills,build): pre-build cost & budget transparency phase between SPECIFICATION approval and build kickoff

narratives.Description: feat(skills,build): pre-build cost & budget transparency phase between SPECIFICATION approval and build kickoff
narratives.Problem: Per #151 (issues #7 and #14, the only critical hard blocker in the playtest), users complete install -> bootstrap -> interview -> PRD -> SPECIFICATION approval and stop at build because deft offers no cost signal. For non-technical users, small businesses, and non-profits, this is a build-phase blocker.
narratives.Acceptance: Insert a new phase or skill between SPECIFICATION approval and build kickoff producing a COST-ESTIMATE.md (or similar) artifact covering: pre-flight account/sign-up summary, hosting/infra cost ranges calibrated to the spec's tech stack, API/third-party fee estimates, monthly low/typical/high band, scale considerations, and an explicit build/no/rescope decision point. Build skill MUST refuse kickoff until the cost artifact exists AND the user has explicitly accepted, rescoped, or skipped (with a recorded skip reason). Plain-English ranges; no spreadsheets. NEW references/cost-models.md captures methodology. Tests cover artifact creation, build-gate behavior, and rescope loop.
narratives.OutOfScope: Hard cost numbers; real-time pricing API integration; currency/region localization (USD-only first pass).
narratives.Files: NEW skills/deft-directive-cost/SKILL.md (or phase added to existing skill); skills/deft-directive-build/SKILL.md (build-gate); AGENTS.md (routing keyword + skill chain entry); NEW references/cost-models.md; templates/COST-ESTIMATE.md (new); tests/skills/test_cost_phase*.py (new); CHANGELOG.md (append).

items.title: NEW cost/budget skill or phase invoked between spec approval and build kickoff
NEW COST-ESTIMATE.md artifact contract; reference from PROJECT-DEFINITION
Build skill refuses kickoff until cost artifact exists and is accepted/rescoped/skipped
Plain-English ranges with low/typical/high bands; non-technical-user voice
AGENTS.md routing entry for the new cost phase + skill chain integration
Tests: artifact creation, build-gate behavior, rescope loop
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry under Added referencing #739 (and #151 umbrella)

references.title: Issue #739: feat(skills,build): pre-build cost & budget transparency phase between SPECIFICATION approval and build kickoff

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
